{{CargoRelic
|name=Orpheus' Lyre
|class_id=22553
|rank=AA
|affct=FAITH
|birthday=12-20
|source=
|description=On Dec 20, 2800 BC, Orpheus played his lyre before the lord of the underworld.<br>Orpheus was the son of the sun god Apollo and possessed extraordinary musical talent, capable of enchanting the world with his music. After his wife died tragically, he risked his life and ventured alone into the underworld, where he played his seven-stringed lyre before the king and queen of the underworld, winning the chance to bring his wife back to the living world. However, just as they were about to leave, he couldn't resist his wife's complaints and looked back, breaking his agreement with the lord of the underworld and failing in his attempt. Heartbroken, Orpheus lost interest in life and sealed away his lyre, never to play it again.
|fame=36
|art=43
|fth=69
|civ=37
|tech=43
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70
|ss7=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
}}
